brand.name: Receipt Room 11:59
brand.positioning: A symbolic tabloid microdrama planner for global pop-culture gossip. It turns verified public signals and fan interpretation into a short-form episode plan without realistic likeness, voice cloning, or unsupported sensitive claims.

research_sources.finding: TikTok's 2026 trend signals emphasize Reali-TEA, Curiosity Detours, and Emotional ROI: real-time cultural tea, comment-led discovery, and emotional payoff.
Trend selection should use first-party trend discovery, not only creator intuition.
TikTok usage remains broad among US adults and especially young users, making entertainment and pop-culture topics a viable global signal proxy.
TikTok trend tracking surfaces fan-reaction topics such as Euphoria/Cassie, Billie Eilish, Olivia Rodrigo, nostalgia, and celebrity-adjacent moments.
Vertical microdramas are one to two minutes, mobile-first, and winning engagement intensity against major mobile streaming apps.
Realistic AI-generated images, audio, or video must be labeled, and some public-figure contexts remain prohibited even when labeled.
AIGC cannot falsely show public figures in certain contexts such as endorsement or being bullied; private figure likeness and young people are protected.

google_news_queries: celebrity gossip OR red carpet OR dating rumor
site:people.com celebrity dating OR red carpet
site:eonline.com celebrity dating OR red carpet
site:tmz.com celebrity viral OR tiktok OR dating
Taylor Swift Travis Kelce OR Kylie Timothee OR Billie Eilish TikTok

risk_policy.default_disclosure: AI-generated symbolic pop-culture parody. Verified reporting and fan speculation are separated on screen.
visual_never_do: do not imitate a real face
do not clone a real voice
do not put exact real names in generation prompts
do not present fan theories as confirmed facts
do not imply commercial or political endorsement

global_rules: full-body character design with clear outfit, gesture, and body line
exaggerate the archetype through wardrobe, posture, props, and body language
celebrity-inspired symbolic parody with fictionalized features
reference_style_policy.female_glamour: red-carpet glamour with a confident sensual pose, stylized hourglass body line, fitted couture dress, high slit or corset-inspired silhouette, polished hair and makeup, provocative glossy camera-aware tabloid heat
reference_style_policy.male_power: charismatic power styling with sharp tailoring, athletic posture, status props, jealousy or tension in body language, attractive controlled status-heavy presence
reference_style_policy.neutral_drama: tabloid-drama styling with clear face, expressive posture, distinctive props, and readable social status

default.visual_rules: expressive adult-coded tabloid figure, full visible character design, fictionalized facial features, abstract paparazzi light, distinctive wardrobe

by_keyword.visual_rules: glamorous podcast empress, expressive face, fitted red-carpet couture, confident sensual stance, chrome podcast microphone throne, headline cards orbiting the character, fictionalized facial features, invented show insignia
producer archetype with sharp tailoring, tense guarded posture, backstage pass, red carpet edge light, fictionalized facial features

viral glamour archetype, expressive face, fitted nightlife couture, confident camera-aware pose, phone camera halo, influencer flash wall, glittering comment storm, fictionalized facial features, invented social handle motif

adult pop royalty archetype, expressive face, fitted stage couture, dramatic body line, silver microphone, crown-shaped stage light, glitter boots, fictionalized facial features, invented stage wardrobe
adult athlete-prince archetype, broad confident posture, fictional varsity jacket, stadium tunnel light, invented sports iconography, fictionalized facial features
adult mysterious performer archetype, white-hot stage aura, desert club lighting, mirrored sunglasses as a symbolic mask, fictionalized facial features

awkward_encounter.hook_template: This two-second run-in made the internet split into juries.
awkward_encounter.comment_prompt: Was this awkward, scripted, or just fans over-reading it?

evidence_board.hook_template: Fans found three receipts. Only one actually matters.
evidence_board.comment_prompt: Which receipt is real evidence and which one is fan fiction?

character_trial.hook_template: Tonight, the internet puts this character on trial.

lyric_receipt.hook_template: One lyric turned into a full detective board.
lyric_receipt.comment_prompt: Is this a direct shot or are fans building the story?

publicity_or_real.hook_template: The internet cannot decide if this is romance or rollout.
publicity_or_real.comment_prompt: PR, real, or perfectly timed coincidence?

shot_templates.visual_template: {main_character} stands in a symbolic tabloid spotlight while comment bubbles rush toward camera.
shot_templates.motion: camera snap-zooms into the empty space beside the character; comments flood from both sides

shot_templates.visual_template: A receipt board stamps CONFIRMED on one clean card while rumor cards stay blurred.
shot_templates.motion: one card slams onto the board; a red stamp lands; blurred cards slide away

shot_templates.visual_template: Anonymous fan avatars connect string between symbolic photos, dates, and a glowing question mark.
shot_templates.motion: red string stretches across the board; one clue lights up and another clue flickers out

shot_templates.caption_template: But one clue breaks the theory.
shot_templates.visual_template: The evidence board glitches as one receipt flips over and contradicts the headline.
shot_templates.motion: board shakes; a receipt flips; camera pushes through paper debris

shot_templates.visual_template: {main_character} and {second_character} face each other across a red carpet courtroom with paparazzi flash walls.
shot_templates.motion: two symbolic figures turn away from each other; flashbulbs pop; the floor becomes a courtroom aisle

shot_templates.visual_template: A split meter moves between CONFIRMED, REPORTED, FAN THEORY, and REACHING.
shot_templates.motion: meter needle swings hard, stops, then trembles near fan theory

shot_templates.visual_template: A comment jury wall opens with three giant buttons: awkward, scripted, over-read.
shot_templates.motion: three buttons rise from the floor; camera lands on the comment box
